name: Easter Woven Sitting Bunny - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your springtime decor with the natural aesthetic of this Easter Woven Sitting Bunny from Threshold™. This woven bunny in a sitting posture features a brown braided design crafted from grass, accented with a cheerful pink bow tie. Perfect for adding texture and warmth to your festive decorations, this rustic bunny creates inviting visual interest on tables, mantels or shelves. Display it as a charming standalone accent or pair it with other seasonal decor for a coordinated, nature-inspired look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
